records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. You're still standing in that state.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. You're still standing in that state.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. You're still standing in that state.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be... that you're truly immortal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could it be... that you're truly immortal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be... that you're truly immortal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fascinating... truly fascinating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fascinating... truly fascinating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fascinating... truly fascinating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: These bullets... must cost a fortune...
records.m_Talk_DEU: These bullets... must cost a fortune...
records.m_Talk_FRA: These bullets... must cost a fortune...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I could sell them... I'd make a killing... right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I could sell them... I'd make a killing... right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I could sell them... I'd make a killing... right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do as you please.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do as you please.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do as you please.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not that you'll be leaving here anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not that you'll be leaving here anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not that you'll be leaving here anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't see it with your eyes gone, but we're at the heart of my estate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't see it with your eyes gone, but we're at the heart of my estate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't see it with your eyes gone, but we're at the heart of my estate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been herding you here, little by little, like a proper hunt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been herding you here, little by little, like a proper hunt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been herding you here, little by little, like a proper hunt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have a sickness where you'll die if you stop talking?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have a sickness where you'll die if you stop talking?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have a sickness where you'll die if you stop talking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, but the moment a successful experiment is within reach, it's simply exhilarating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, but the moment a successful experiment is within reach, it's simply exhilarating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, but the moment a successful experiment is within reach, it's simply exhilarating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely, you can relate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely, you can relate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely, you can relate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like when you come into a lot of money...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like when you come into a lot of money...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like when you come into a lot of money...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't act like we have anything in common. It's disgusting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't act like we have anything in common. It's disgusting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't act like we have anything in common. It's disgusting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My, my. I'm just... curious about everything related to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My, my. I'm just... curious about everything related to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My, my. I'm just... curious about everything related to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How has your bone density changed? What does your true form look like?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How has your bone density changed? What does your true form look like?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How has your bone density changed? What does your true form look like?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you get your watch when the Red Moon appeared? What do you eat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you get your watch when the Red Moon appeared? What do you eat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you get your watch when the Red Moon appeared? What do you eat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was that episode of madness a first? Do you fear water?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was that episode of madness a first? Do you fear water?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was that episode of madness a first? Do you fear water?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And normally
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And normally
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And normally
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! Let me get a word in!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! Let me get a word in!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! Let me get a word in!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I was here to break a Corrupted Wedge, not deal with some freak...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I was here to break a Corrupted Wedge, not deal with some freak...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I was here to break a Corrupted Wedge, not deal with some freak...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've eliminated every possible variable that could let you fight back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've eliminated every possible variable that could let you fight back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've eliminated every possible variable that could let you fight back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know nothing, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know nothing, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know nothing, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how tricky the haunting, one thing never changes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how tricky the haunting, one thing never changes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how tricky the haunting, one thing never changes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corrupted Wedge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corrupted Wedge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corrupted Wedge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I take that thing out, I can deal with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I take that thing out, I can deal with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I take that thing out, I can deal with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're using an Abomination as a Corrupted Wedge, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're using an Abomination as a Corrupted Wedge, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're using an Abomination as a Corrupted Wedge, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I get rid of it, my odds improve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I get rid of it, my odds improve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I get rid of it, my odds improve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good observation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good observation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good observation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's my job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's my job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's my job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Corrupted Wedge removal disguised as exorcisms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corrupted Wedge removal disguised as exorcisms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corrupted Wedge removal disguised as exorcisms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever you did, experimenting on your staff or kidnapping people, that's none of my business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever you did, experimenting on your staff or kidnapping people, that's none of my business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever you did, experimenting on your staff or kidnapping people, that's none of my business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But trying to stiff me on my pay and using me as a lab rat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But trying to stiff me on my pay and using me as a lab rat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But trying to stiff me on my pay and using me as a lab rat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't let that slide. You're going down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't let that slide. You're going down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't let that slide. You're going down.
